last_episode_to_air.name: A Line of Great Heroes
last_episode_to_air.overview: With the future at stake, Richter and friends join forces against a terrifying new evil that puts their powers — and the Belmont legacy — to the test.

name: Castlevania: Nocturne
overview: As revolution sweeps France, Richter Belmont fights to uphold his family's legacy and prevent the rise of a ruthless, power-hungry vampire ruler.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: Richter Belmont joins forces with Maria and an unlikely crew of characters whose toughened exteriors bely their various tragic backstories. Bringing their formidable shape-shifting powers to bear, they seek to prevent the seemingly imminent reign of the vampire messiah. Their last-ditch battle to save humanity becomes fraught with existential questions as each vampire hunter is forced to confront their own troubled (and deeply human) traumatic past. And as the vampires threaten to leave the world in eternal darkness, there’s no time to spare — and plenty of dark drama on display.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Aided by the legendary Alucard, Richter and his band of vampire hunters must race to stop powerful Erzsebet from plunging the world into eternal night.

tagline: I pray for you, Richter Belmont.
